---
title: "Two data-generating architectures for biomarker-treatment interaction in N-of-1 trials"
author:
  - pmsimstats team
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%Y-%m-%d')`"
output:
  bookdown::pdf_document2:
    latex_engine: xelatex
    keep_tex: true
    toc: false
    number_sections: true
bibliography: references.bib
csl: statistics-in-medicine.csl
link-citations: true
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.path = "../figures/01-",
  cache.path = "_cache/"
)
```

# Abstract

*(Draft placeholder. Distil from `docs/02-dgp-mean-moderation-vs-mvn.tex` abstract.)*

# Introduction

*(Adapt `docs/02` Section 1. Motivate the two-architecture question in precision-medicine N-of-1 trial design.)*

# Two data-generating architectures

## Direct mean moderation (Architecture A)

*(From `docs/02` Section 2.1.)*

## Differential correlation via multivariate normal (Architecture B)

*(From `docs/02` Section 2.2.)*

## Mathematical comparison

*(From `docs/02` Section 2.3.)*

# Consequences for statistical power under carryover

*(From `docs/02` Section 3. Pull simulation numbers from `implementations/original-extended/` runs recorded in `../data/`.)*

# Biological assumptions and when each architecture applies

*(From `docs/02` Section 4, condensed.)*

# Reporting recommendations

*(From `docs/02` Section 5, condensed.)*

# Discussion

*(New material. Relate to PATH Statement, crossover methodology literature, latent-class mixture modelling tension raised by reviewer RH.)*

# References
